mean_en: the act of accepting somebody into an institution, organization, etc.; the right to enter a place or to join an institution or organization
sentence: In spite of his admission of fault, his mother is still angry at him.
sentence_trans: 虽然他承认错误了，但是他妈妈依然对他很生气。
word_etyma: ad向.... + mission放开；发送 → admission承认，允许进入
